name: Rusty Tab Manager
description: Automatically groups tabs by second-level domain and collapses other groups when switching tabs.

expand-all-groups.description: Expand all tab groups in the current window

collapse-all-groups.description: Collapse all tab groups in the current window

group-audio-tabs.description: Group all tabs playing audio into an audio group

ungroup-audio-tabs.description: Ungroup audio tabs and return them to their domain groups
